branch_unit_pattern_summary: Passes the fine branch layers and fails the compressed cutset layers.
reported_interpretation: Supporting comparison; compatible where branch resolution is sufficient, but not treated as unrestricted portability evidence.
Stable rejection under the PH908/R1a source-receiver test geometry.

branch_unit_pattern_summary: Passes five of six evaluated branch-resolution layers and fails the direct-child cutset layer.
reported_interpretation: Supporting non-target comparison within the stated J-M267/J1 context; not a universal origin classifier.

branch_unit_pattern_summary: Passes only the deepest observed branch layer, has one no-call, and fails the compressed cutset layers.
reported_interpretation: Support-only boundary diagnostic showing that deepest-label compatibility can fail branch-unit reliability checks.

branch_unit_pattern_summary: Passes the deepest observed and depth-2 cutset layers, has one no-call, and fails the remaining compressed layers.
reported_interpretation: Support-only boundary diagnostic showing scale sensitivity outside the main E/J/R comparison set.

branch_unit_pattern_summary: Passes the fine branch layers and the depth-3/count-balanced layers but fails direct-child and depth-2 compression.
reported_interpretation: Matched R1a source-receiver comparator with scale sensitivity.
